title: Speedy Savory Jamaican Shrimp Pasta
description: A quick and flavorful Jamaican-inspired pasta dish featuring shrimp and bowtie pasta, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This pescatarian-friendly recipe is ready in under 30 minutes.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the bowtie pasta according to the package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat and saute the chopped onion until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Add the shrimp to the skillet and sprinkle with jamaican jerk seasoning, cooking until the shrimp are pink and fully cooked.
In a small bowl, whisk together the chicken broth and a tablespoon of the pasta water, then add the mixture to the skillet and stir to combine.
Drain the cooked pasta and add it to the skillet, tossing to coat with the shrimp and sauce.
Season with salt and pepper to taste, then sprinkle with grated parmesan cheese and serve immediately.
